capability_questions.capability_name: Service exists and is in good condition

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a change management service?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a change management service exists

questions.prompt: Is the change management service reviewed at least quarterly to measure its efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the service is reviewed on a regular cadence for efficacy

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have change management software to generate and track change requests?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether change management software generates change requests

questions.prompt: Does the change management system and process cover the entire enterprise and its subsidiaries?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether change management covers the enterprise broadly

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized and documented change management process?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a formalized documented change process exists
questions.evaluation_focus: Formalized and documented change management process

questions.prompt: Does the change management system support automation of approval for certain change requests?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether change approvals can be automated

questions.prompt: Is the change management system configuration reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether system configuration is reviewed on a regular cadence

questions.prompt: Does the change management system integrate with staging and risk management to support an efficient change process?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the system integrates with staging and risk management
questions.evaluation_focus: Integration with staging and risk management

questions.prompt: Is the change management process reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the change process is reviewed on a regular cadence

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise formalize and document KPIs and KRIs for the change management process?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether change management KPIs and KRIs are documented

questions.prompt: Are change management KPIs and KRIs reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether KPIs and KRIs are reviewed on a regular cadence

questions.prompt: Do KPIs or KRIs track change failure rate or unauthorized changes detected outside the change process?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether change failure and unauthorized change metrics are tracked
questions.evaluation_focus: Change failure and unauthorized change metrics

questions.prompt: Does the organization measure time to restore services after a failed change?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether service restoration time after failed changes is measured
questions.evaluation_focus: Service restoration time after failed changes

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have formalized and documented change management policies for subject changes?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether subject change policies exist

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have formalized and documented change management policies for network changes?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether network change policies exist

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have formalized and documented change management policies for endpoint changes?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether endpoint change policies exist

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have formalized and documented change management policies for application changes?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether application change policies exist

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have formalized and documented change management policies for data or database changes?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether data or database change policies exist

questions.prompt: Are all change management policies applicable across the entire enterprise and reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether policies are enterprise-wide and reviewed regularly

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a change advisory board that approves and denies change requests?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a CAB exists for change approval

questions.prompt: Are CAB members drawn from across the enterprise rather than limited to a single function?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether CAB membership is enterprise-wide

questions.prompt: Does the CAB mandate impact analysis for all major change requests?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether impact analysis is mandated for major changes
questions.evaluation_focus: Impact analysis mandated for major changes

questions.prompt: Is there a formalized documented procedure requestors must complete to provide details for impact analysis?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether an impact analysis procedure is documented

questions.prompt: Can impact analysis be automated as part of a CI/CD pipeline?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether impact analysis can be automated in CI/CD

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have change management baselines for all change request types?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether baselines exist for all change types
questions.evaluation_focus: Baselines for all change request types

questions.prompt: Are change management baselines monitored and reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether baselines are monitored and reviewed regularly

questions.prompt: Does the SOC or visibility solution identify deviations from established change baselines?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the SOC identifies baseline deviations

questions.prompt: Can change baseline deviations be identified automatically across the entire enterprise?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether deviation detection is enterprise-wide and automatic

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have an exception management process for changes that cannot undergo standard impact analysis?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether an exception process exists for changes without impact analysis
questions.evaluation_focus: Exception process for changes without impact analysis

questions.prompt: Is the exception management process deployed across the entire enterprise and cloud?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether exception management covers enterprise and cloud

questions.prompt: Are change management exceptions reviewed after they have been granted?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether exceptions receive post-exception review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have the capability to restore services when a change fails?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether service restoration capability exists after failed changes

questions.prompt: Is there a documented formalized process for service restoration when a change fails?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a documented restoration process exists

questions.prompt: Are automated processes in place to switch traffic and restore services when a change fails?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether traffic switch and restoration are automated

questions.prompt: Is the restoration process reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the restoration process is reviewed on a regular cadence

questions.prompt: Can restoration integrate with management controllers to apply policy and network changes needed for recovery?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether restoration integrates with management controllers
